title: Care Gaps
description: Care Gaps identifies patients who have not received clinically indicated interventions, screenings, or follow-up care based on defined quality measures. This feature supports care management programs by surfacing actionable gaps at the individual patient level within patient timelines and profiles.
tips: Define care gap criteria using existing cohort definitions to ensure consistent, reusable logic across quality programs.
Review care gaps in the context of the full Patient Timeline to understand clinical history before outreach.
Filter care gap results by care site or provider to target quality improvement efforts at the appropriate organizational level.
Schedule periodic care gap evaluations to track closure rates and measure the impact of interventions over time.
